titleStmt.title: SII 5.635: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 635. (A.R. No. 77 of 1895). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiru manni vaḷara Irunila maṭant Aiyum porc
ceyaṟ pāvaiyum cīrttanic celviyu n=ta n perun=tevi
yarāki Inpuṟa neṭutuya ruḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭum
tuṭarvanavelip paṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷi
ppākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuṟaṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum poru
kaṭa līḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum Āṅkavana ṟeviya roṅkeḻi
l muṭiyum mun navarpakkal tennavan vaiytta cun=ta ra muṭiyu mi
n=ti ra nāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik kera
ḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mā
laiyum caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāval pala paḻan=tī vum ceruviṟ cinavi Iru
pattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāman mevaruñ cān=ti maṟṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya ce
mpoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan
Aḻapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭiyal Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamum punanetikkulapperumalaika
ḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavalla maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷa nāma
ṇaiykkoṇaiyum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācuṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamum
Ayarvil vaṇkirtti(y) yātinakaravaiyil can=ti ran ṟolkulat tin=ti raratanai viḷai yamarkkaḷattu ki
ḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikula tanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭarum ceṟimiḷai yoṭṭavi
ṣai yamum pūcurarcer nalk kocalaināṭum tanmapālanai vemmunai yaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai co
lait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūranai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇakirtti takkaṇalāṭamum kovinna
ccan=ta n māviḻi n=to ṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭṭal mahipālanai veñ
camarviḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yānaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilaneṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamu
m veṟimalart tirtta teṟipunal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celuttik caṅkirāmavicaiyo
ttuṅkapanmanākiya kaṭārattaraiyanai vākayam porukaṭal kumpaṟkariyoṭu makappaṭut turimaiyil piṟakkiya
perunatit tiṟakkamum Ārttava(n)nak(ā)nakar porttoḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum meyttoḷir punamaṇip
putavamum kanamaṇik katavamum niṟai śrīvicayamum tuṟainirp pannaiyum vanamalaiyūraiyiṟ ṟonmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭala
kaḻcūḻ māyiruṭi(li)ṅkamum kalaṅkā valvinai Ilaṅkācokamum koppuṟu niṟainal māppa pāḷamum kāvalan puricai
mevilimpaṅkamum viḷappantūṟuṭai vaḷappantūṟum kalaittakkor pukaḻ talaittakkolamum titamāvalvi
nai mātamaliṅkamum kalāmukil kaṭun=ti ṟal lāmuritecamum tenakkalar poḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭal kāva
ṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanma rāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḻade varkku yāṇṭu
10 6 Āvatu rājentra ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu poykaināṭṭu tirumaḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyama hā- de varkku Iravum pakalum ca
n=ti rātittaval tirunon=tā viḷakku Eriya Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḻade var tirumakaḷār piḷḷaiyār Arumoḻi naṅkaiyā
rāna pirān vaittaruḷina tirunon=tā viḷakku Iraṇṭinukkuk kuṭuttaruḷina cāvā muvāp perāṭu nuṟṟeṇpatu Ivaiyi
ṟṟil Ivvūr Iṭaiyan paṭṭālakan nāraṇan koṇṭa Āṭu nāṟpattañcināl nicatam Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Āḻākkum kuñcira
mallan peruvaḻiyum kuñciramallan kāṭanum kuñciramallan tirumāluṅ koṇṭa Āṭu nāṟpattañcināl nicatam
Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Āḻākkum Araṅkan pāṇṭan koṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl nicatam Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Irucevi ṭa
raiyum Araṅkan maḻuvāṭiyum Araṅkan kaṇavatiyum Araṅkan kāṭukāḷum koṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl nicatam Aṭ
kkaṭava ney Iruceviṭaraiyum cūṟṟi maḻuvāṭi koṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl nicatam Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Irucevi ṭaraiyu
m maḻuvāṭi kaṇavati koṇṭa Āṭu Irupattiraṇṭaraiyināl nicatam Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Irucevi ṭaraiyum Āka Ivarkaḷ koṇṭa
Āṭu nuṟṟeṇpatinālum tirumaḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattu paṇṭāranāḻiyāla nicatam Aṭṭakkaṭava ney Uri
yuṅ koṇṭu cantirātittaval Ittirunon=tā viḷakku Iraṇṭum Erikkakaṭavom tirumaḻuvāṭi Uṭaiyār tevarkanmi
Ivviḷakku Eriya pirān vaittaruḷina tarāviḷakku Uṭkaru vuṭpaṭa Āṟucā ṇucarattu viḷakku Iraṇṭi
nāl niṟai Eḻunuṟṟu palam Ivai can=ti rātittaval patmā heśva ra rakṣai .—
Digital edition of SII 5.635 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
